module.name: pricing
module.description: Pricing tiers side by side. Body = one section per tier: first line = name, second = price, then a bullet list of features. `highlight` features one tier.
module.aiSpec:
A PRICING TABLE — plan tiers side by side. Use this for plan/tier comparison; for a generic column layout use @multicolumn and for a labelled data grid use @table. Block module: split the body with <!-- @ -->, one section per TIER. In a tier, line 1 = the plan NAME, line 2 = the PRICE, and the remaining bullets ("- …") are features (Markdown). Parameters: • highlight — 1-based index of the tier to feature/recommend (integer, default 0 = none). • color — accent color for names, borders and the featured tier (default var(--accent-color)). • badge — small ribbon text shown on the featured tier, e.g. "Popular" (default blank = none). • radius — CSS corner radius of each tier card (default 10px). • gap — CSS length of the space between tiers (default 12px).
<!-- @pricing highlight: 2, badge: Most popular --> Free $0 / mo - 1 project - Community support <!-- @ --> Pro $12 / mo - Unlimited projects - Priority support <!-- @ --> Team $40 / mo - SSO - Admin controls <!-- @end -->

param.name: highlight
param.label: Featured tier (1-based)
param.desc: Which tier to visually feature; 0 = none.

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Accent color for names, borders and the featured tier.

param.name: badge
param.label: Featured badge
param.desc: Ribbon text on the featured tier (e.g. Most popular); blank = no ribbon.

param.name: radius
param.label: Card radius
param.desc: CSS corner radius of each tier card (e.g. 10px, 1rem).

param.name: gap
param.label: Tier gap
param.desc: CSS length of the space between tiers (e.g. 12px, 1rem).

snippet.label: Pricing tiers
snippet.text: <!-- @pricing highlight: 2 --> Free $0 / mo - 1 project - Community support <!-- @ --> Pro **$12** / mo - Unlimited projects - Priority support <!-- @ --> Team $40 / mo - SSO & admin <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Plan tiers side by side; line1=name, line2=price, bullets=features. highlight: n features a tier.
